pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Andy Warhol "Brillo" 2022 1000%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy present the Be@rbrick Andy Warhol 'Brillo' 2022 1000% Collectible Figure!  Standing at approximately 27.55' tall, this Be@rbrick figure features a print of the cleaning pads 'Brillo' with the popular Andy Warhol style.  Don't miss your chance to add this Be@rbrick to your collection today!
